issues.criterion: Content not on da.live — all preview URLs return 404
issues.details: No EDS_TOKEN was provided during the migration run. All da.live Source API calls returned 401 Unauthorized. All five pilot preview URLs (/, /about, /contact-us, /careers, /knowledge/library/...) return HTTP 404. No preview rendering, visual comparison, JS-error check, or chrome-presence check is possible.
issues.remediation: Provide a valid EDS_TOKEN, then re-run da.live uploads using the staged HTML files from .eds-migration/state/migrated-html/ and .eds-migration/state/content-staging/.

issues.criterion: Screenshot pairs are mandatory — none can be produced
issues.details: Per verifier rules, every page check requires desktop (≥1280px) and mobile (≤420px) screenshot pairs comparing source-bundle captures to live preview renders. Because all preview URLs return 404, no preview screenshots can be captured. The visual-comparison gate (pHash / SSIM similarity threshold) cannot be evaluated. This alone is an automatic FAIL.
issues.remediation: Upload content to da.live, then re-run this verifier to capture screenshot pairs and compute similarity scores.

issues.criterion: Incomplete pilot coverage — 11 of 15 blueprint pilot pages have no committed HTML
issues.details: The blueprint specifies 15 pilot pages across 15 archetypes. Only 4 have HTML committed to the branch (homepage, about, contact-us, knowledge-library). The careers page is staged but in a secondary content-staging/ directory. Two more (knowledge-expert/abi-pesun and news-post/almac-clinical-services...) have status files claiming HTML was generated but the htmlPath points to /home/claude/scratch — outside the repo and not committed. The remaining 9 pilot archetypes (award, clinical-services, diagnostics, bd-team-profile, news-post[correct URL], api-chemical-product, events, careers-story, landing, careers-resource) have no status files and no HTML artifacts at all.
issues.remediation: Complete migration for all 15 blueprint pilot pages. Commit generated HTML to .eds-migration/state/migrated-html/ or .eds-migration/state/content-staging/ — not to ephemeral scratch paths.

issues.criterion: Chrome presence cannot be verified — previews are 404
issues.details: Check 6 (chrome/header+footer band present on rendered preview) is impossible: all preview URLs return 404. The rendered HTML files show nav and footer were generated as separate documents, but whether they render correctly as EDS chrome on the live site cannot be confirmed.
issues.remediation: Upload nav.html and footer.html to da.live at /nav and /footer paths, then verify chrome renders on a pilot preview page.

issues.criterion: Two inconsistent nav/footer versions exist in the branch
issues.details: Both .eds-migration/state/migrated-html/ and .eds-migration/state/content-staging/ contain separate nav.html and footer.html files that differ in content. The content-staging footer is a flat unsectioned list without a <footer> wrapper; the migrated-html footer has proper structure with sections, contact numbers, and social links. It is unclear which version is authoritative.
issues.remediation: Consolidate to a single canonical nav.html and footer.html and remove the duplicate.

issues.criterion: Footer URL paths differ from source chrome bundle
issues.details: Three footer links use incorrect EDS paths vs the crawled source: (1) /about/ instead of /about-us/, (2) /about/our-locations/ instead of /our-locations/, (3) /privacy-policy/ instead of /privacy-cookie-policy/. These will produce broken footer links post-launch.
issues.remediation: Verify correct EDS destination paths for these URLs before upload (they may be intentional redirects or path changes in EDS).

issues.criterion: HTML artifacts for knowledge-expert and news-post not committed to branch
issues.details: Status files for /knowledge/experts/abi-pesun and /news/almac-clinical-services-scoops-national-training-award claim htmlGenerated=true but htmlPath references /home/claude/scratch/page-migrator/output/ — a path outside the repo. These HTML files are not committed and will be lost on workspace teardown.
issues.remediation: Copy these generated HTML files into .eds-migration/state/migrated-html/ and commit them.

issues.criterion: Nested block table inside Columns cell (contact-us.html)
issues.details: The contact-us.html places a HubSpot Form block table inside the first column cell of the Columns block. While EDS technically allows nested tables, this pattern may cause rendering issues depending on how the Columns block JS processes cell content.
issues.remediation: Consider restructuring: place the HubSpot Form as a standalone block after the Columns block, or verify that the EDS Columns block handles nested tables correctly.

issues.criterion: Content fidelity word-overlap below 50% threshold on homepage and contact-us
issues.details: Word-set overlap between source rendered HTML main-content and migrated HTML: homepage 0.42 (below 0.50 threshold), about 0.68 (pass), contact-us 0.12 (heavily below threshold). The contact-us low ratio is partly due to a very large source HTML with megamenu navigation text, but the migrated HTML is also missing several office location detail fields visible in the source. Note: source HTML files include full WordPress rendered output with mega-nav and tracking scripts inflating source word counts.
issues.remediation: Verify contact-us.html includes all office location addresses, phone/fax/email, and map links visible in source. The low contact-us ratio warrants manual review.

evidence.render_strategy: N/A — preview URL returns HTTP 404; content was never uploaded to da.live (EDS_TOKEN missing, 401 on upload)
evidence.finding: HTML generated and committed. EDS block table structure is correct. Key content phrases verified present. Cannot do visual/chrome/JS-error check — preview is 404. Word overlap 0.42 is below 0.50 threshold (source HTML includes megamenu inflation). Screenshot pairs: ABSENT (preview 404).

evidence.finding: HTML generated and committed. EDS block table structure is correct. Word overlap 0.68 passes threshold. Cannot do visual/chrome/JS-error check — preview is 404. Screenshot pairs: ABSENT (preview 404).

Cannot do visual/chrome check — preview 404. Screenshot pairs: ABSENT.

evidence.finding: HTML generated and staged. EDS block structure correct with appropriate gated-content pattern. Key content phrases verified present. Word overlap 0.11 is below threshold but driven by large source HTML (936 source words inc. mega-nav). Status file claims textLenRatio=0.82 based on its own fidelity check. evidence.render_strategy: N/A — no status file, no HTML generated for this blueprint pilot page
evidence.finding: MISSING — No status file and no HTML committed. This blueprint pilot page was never processed by the worker.

evidence.render_strategy: N/A — no status file, no HTML generated for this blueprint pilot page
evidence.finding: MISSING — No status file and no HTML committed. This blueprint pilot page was never processed by the worker.

Nav HTML generated with 13 top-level links (correct — EDS nav should be top-level only, not the full 705-link mega-menu). Two nav versions exist (migrated-html/nav.html and content-staging/nav.html differ). Preview 404. Screenshot pairs: ABSENT.

Footer HTML generated. 15 links vs 16 in source (one intentional omission). Three URL path discrepancies noted (low severity). Two footer versions in branch differ in structure — migrated-html version is better structured. Preview 404. Screenshot pairs: ABSENT.

summary: FAIL — EDS_TOKEN was not provided, preventing all da.live uploads; all 5 checked preview URLs return 404, making visual comparison, chrome verification, and JS-error checks impossible. Only 5 of 15 blueprint pilot pages have HTML committed to the branch (33% coverage). Two further HTML artifacts were saved to ephemeral scratch paths outside the repo. The generated HTML files that do exist follow correct EDS block-table structure and pass key content-phrase spot-checks, but cannot be validated end-to-end without live previews.
